revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:東久留米七福神]]


{{ページ番号|date=2016th year 12月11日 (日) 09:51 (UTC)}}

'''{{ill|Higashi-Kurume Seven Lucky Gods|ja|東久留米七福神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-Kurume Seven Lucky Gods|qq=}}''' (ひがしくるめしちふくじん) is the collective name for the seven deities enshrined in five {{ill|Buddhist temple|en|Buddhist temple|qid=Q5393308|lt=temples|1=Buddhist temple}} located in {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Metropolis|1=Tokyo}} {{ill|Higashikurume, Tokyo|en|Higashikurume, Tokyo|qid=Q317830|lt=Higashikurume City|1=Higashikurume, Tokyo}}. These temples are situated in an area surrounded by the {{ill|Kurome River|ja|黒目川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurome River|1=Kurome River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678731}} and its tributary {{ill|Ochiai River|ja|落合川 (東京都)|lt=Ochiai River|lt_ja=落合川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ochiai River|1=Ochiai RIver|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28684664}}, which gave rise to the name of the region. In addition, at {{ill|Daien-ji|ja|大圓寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daien-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大円寺|1=Daien-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432577}}, the main image of all seven deities is enshrined.

== Higashikurume Seven Lucky Gods List ==
* {{ill|Daien-ji|ja|大圓寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daien-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大円寺|1=Daien-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432577}} – enshrines {{ill|Jurōjin|en|Jurōjin|qid=Q389611|lt=Jurojin|1=Jurōjin}}, {{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|qid=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju|1=Fukurokuju}}, and {{ill|Ebisu (mythology)|en|Ebisu (mythology)|qid=Q1129330|lt=Ebisu|1=Ebisu (mythology)}}
* {{ill|Yonezu-ji|ja|米津寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yonezu-ji|1=Beishin-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q29407955}} – enshrines {{ill|Hotei|ja|布袋尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hotei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 布袋|1=Budai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q599838}}
* {{ill|Tamon-ji|ja|多聞寺 (東久留米市)|lt=Tamon-ji|lt_ja=多聞寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamon-ji|1=Tamon-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28684662}} – enshrines {{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|qid=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten|1=Vaiśravaṇa}}
* {{ill|Jomokuin|ja|浄牧院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jomokuin|1=Jōboku-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119928970}} – enshrines {{ill|Daikokuten|en|Daikokuten|qid=Q1759916|lt=Daikokuten|1=Daikokuten}}
* {{ill|Hōsen-ji|ja|宝泉寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōsen-ji|1=Hōsen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11452593}} – enshrines {{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}}

== Footnotes ==

{{Reflist}}

== References ==
* {{cite book|和書|editor=グループ漫歩|title=ゆったり歩こう！東京ありがた七福神めぐり|publisher={{ill|Japan Publishing|ja|日本出版社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Publishing|1=Nihon Shuppansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11507370}}|year=2009}}
